title: Blue Fishing Rod
description: Retextures the Fishing Rod into a blue variant.
body:
# Blue Fishing Rod – Minecraft Resource Pack

A simple Minecraft resource pack that recolors the **Fishing Rod** into a clean blue theme — including the **bobber** — and updates the **subtitle** and **item name** to match.

Because blue is peak aesthetic.

---

## 🎣 What This Pack Does

- Recolors the Fishing Rod item to **blue**
- Recolors the fishing **bobber**
- Changes the Fishing Rod **item name**
- Updates the related **subtitle text**
- Lightweight & client-side only

---

## 💙 Why Blue?

The aesthetic is aquatic.

---

## 🛠 Installation

1. Download or clone this resource pack.
2. Put the folder or `.zip` into:
3. Launch Minecraft → **Options** → **Resource Packs**
4. Enable the pack.
5. Done.

---

## 📁 Pack Scope

This pack only affects:

- Fishing Rod textures
- Bobber texture
- Language entries for item name & subtitle

No gameplay changes.  
No mechanics altered.  
Pure cosmetic vibes.

---

## ⚠ Notes

- Multiplayer friendly (client-side only).
- Works in survival & creative.
- If Minecraft updates fishing textures or language keys in future versions, this pack may require updates.

---

## 🔵 Go fish… but make it blue.
